name: Call of Duty Mobile
description: Fast-paced mobile FPS featuring multiplayer modes, battle royale, and iconic Call of Duty gameplay.

roles.name: Slayer
roles.description: Aggressive player focused on eliminations and map pressure

roles.name: Objective Player
roles.description: Focuses on capturing and defending objectives

roles.name: Support
roles.description: Uses scorestreaks and utility to assist team

roles.name: Anchor
roles.description: Holds key positions and prevents enemy flanks

maps.name: Nuketown
tips: Control the center lane for map dominance
Use houses for cover and objective defense
Watch for grenade spam at match start
Flank through side lanes when center is locked

maps.name: Crash
tips: Mid control is essential for rotations
Three-lane design allows for strategic flanks
Helicopter area provides strong defensive position
Customize HUD layout for comfortable controls
Use high frame rate mode for competitive advantage
Learn recoil patterns for meta weapons
Equip lightweight perk for faster movement

proStrategies.title: Spawn Control
proStrategies.description: Manipulate enemy spawn points by controlling map areas. Push too far and spawns flip, giving enemies better positions.

proStrategies.title: Scorestreak Stacking
proStrategies.description: Coordinate with team to use scorestreaks in sequence. UAV → Counter-UAV → Predator Missile creates overwhelming pressure.

proStrategies.title: Power Position Rotation
proStrategies.description: Identify and rotate between strong positions on the map. Don't stay static - move after getting 2-3 kills to avoid being pre-aimed.
